title: bartlingia
intro: Bartlingia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Celastraceae, native to tropical Africa. It is a shrub or small tree that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimalarial, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Bartlingia include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Bartlingia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional remedies such as salves and ointments.
